_doc: Single source of truth for active model versions. brain/pipeline.py reads this to find weights paths.  When training a new version, add a new entry under versions{} and bump active.  Old versions stay listed for rollback.

v4.notes: ep11 weights via manual_fitness_watcher (not ep15 nominal-best, which was synth-bias-fitted)

ui._infer_note: MUST infer at imgsz=960 (training size). @1920 = 0 detections.

v6c.status: TEACHER-ONLY (不是 ui 独立模型, 是 unified v6c nc455 借来当纯 UI teacher; live UI 入口域 conf 远胜 v5)。
v6c._teacher_note: prefill/suggest 选 model=ui + version=v6c → get_model 走 ui span(_ui_span: 只留 UI 域 0-142/395-450, 头像143-394+emoticon451 丢弃), remap by name 自动对齐 master。当 v7 val 标注主 UI teacher。但 cafe 内部弱类(咖啡厅收益/邀请卷) v6c 退步 → 那几个改 version=v5 + target_classes 单独补。NOT for pipeline live (pipeline 读 unified.active, 与此无关)。

v6.status: NOT-YET-TRAINED — active 维持 v5, 训练+验证后再切到 v6
v6.notes: v5 + emoticon 折叠: 新增 cls451 Emoticon_Action, 把独立 emoticon_yolo26n 并进 ui 模型 (pipeline 每个 cafe tick 少跑一次 YOLO 推理)。数据集 ui_v2 已重建 nc=452 (198帧/588框 emoticon; teacher=ui_v5 重标 cafe UI chrome 防 200 帧把 收益/邀请卷 等弱cls 训成负样本)。训练: py scripts/train_yolo26.py ui_yolo26m_v6。训完 eval→冻结 last.pt 为 best_real.pt→把本节点 active 改 v6 (pipeline 检测到 ui 含 Emoticon_Action 会自动丢弃独立 emoticon 模型, 无需改码)。配合飞轮: 补弱cls 的新 source 加进 build_ui_v2.py REAL_SOURCES, 重建后与 emoticon 一并训。
v6.merge_tooling: scripts/build_emoticon_ui_source.py (teacher 自动标注) + build_ui_v2.py REAL_SOURCES 末加 _emoticon_v2

v5.notes: warm-start 微调 from v4 (Transferred 756/768; cls头因nc450→451重学). 数据集 ui_v2: 旧train去重(16157→2377唯一, 砍200x oversample过拟合源)+ run_20260531_110516(1052真实)+ run_20260531_143201(37商店, 补选择购买/已选中/绿勾)+ bond synth(441/442/449). cls92恢复. nc=451(新增450选择购买). 薄类适度oversample到30(450→50). lr0=0.005, 60ep, v4同款空间aug, close_mosaic末10ep. best_real.pt=ep60 last.pt冻结(close_mosaic干净收尾, blindval 0.585→0.606). MUST infer @imgsz=960.
v5.eval_note: 无独立held-out(1052/37已进train); 真实验收=dashboard目检. blind _ui_val_pool(51帧)仅early-stop, 末值mAP50≈0.606(不可比v4的0.915@1052). 关键train实例: 92=144/450=56/54=83/绿勾=485/441=415/442=510/449=918.
v5.known_gap: 盯回退类 cls83关卡得星_0/cls112 MIN_灰色(v4曾回退); arena待改用cls92区域选对手(去avatar依赖).

v4.notes: synth(900帧: 441/442/449 贴多样背景)+空间aug(mosaic0.5/copy_paste0.3/scale0.3/translate0.1/hsv_v0.3, fliplr/flipud/degrees=0)修过拟合. from COCO, batch12 imgsz960 cache=disk. 训练ep31中断(机器睡, 未到close_mosaic@140)但已胜v3. best_real.pt = ep31 last.pt 的冻结副本 (NOT nominal best.pt — real-eval: last 0.915 > best 0.877, blind 51帧 val 再次误导). MUST infer @ imgsz=960.
v4.known_gap: cls92 战术大赛对战选择区域=0 (v4训练时被drop; v3也0@IoU0.5因巨框定位差但能粗检供arena点击; v5恢复). 小回退待v5补: cls83 关卡得星_0 0.83→0.11, cls112 MIN_灰色 0.71→0.29 (ep31欠训).

v3.notes: lobby 入口 cls 改标文字(底栏8+MomoTalk+每日领奖+任务大厅) + oversample target=200 (157 cls 全>=200) + 5训练目录(加000756新capture). from COCO (NOT warm-start), patience30 early-stop@ep34, aug全0, batch12, cache=disk. best_real.pt=ep34 last.pt (val-best ep4 只检4入口, ep34 检全8入口 — val 再次误导, ship 看真实截图). MUST infer @ imgsz=960.
v3.verified_real_frame: lobby tick_0010 底栏8入口全检出 0.88-0.99 (v2全0!); 训练帧 每日领奖0.98/MomoTalk0.97/咖啡厅0.99; mail 一次领取0.89. 邮件箱cls4 仍0 (19px太小, oversample救不了, 靠红点兜底).
v3.known_gap: 邮件箱(19px小图标)检不出靠mail.py红点兜底; 每日领奖/MomoTalk 在特殊lobby(banner布局变)泛化弱, 正常lobby OK

v2.notes: Retrain with oversample target=60 (770→4472 frames) + ALL aug=0 (clean UI glyph learning, user spec). best_real.pt = ep16 last.pt — picked over ep5 val-best because real-screenshot generalization is better at ep16 (val mAP is inflated by oversample-duplicate same-distribution val set; ep16 detects 一次领取黄色 conf 0.936 on real mail frame, ep5 misses it). Training was killed at ep16 (resume deadlocked on 4472-img re-scan). MUST infer @ imgsz=960.
v2.verified_real_frame: mail tick_0012: 一次领取黄色 0.936, 体力 0.935, 领取蓝色 0.97 — vs v1 @1920 only cls417 0.567

v1.notes: 1220 train frames (4 dirs + minority oversample target=12) + 51 val. mosaic 0.5, no mixup/fliplr/rotate. SUPERSEDED by v2 — key cls (一次领取/邀请键 etc) under-trained at 12f. Kept for rollback.

emoticon._merge_note: 被折叠进 ui v6 (新增 cls451 Emoticon_Action)。ui active 切到 v6 后, pipeline._get_yolo 检测到 ui 模型含该类即自动停止加载本独立模型 (省每 cafe tick 一次推理)。在此之前 (v5 active) 仍由 pipeline 以 tag=cafe / conf 0.15 单独加载, 维持 cafe headpat。

v26n.notes: single class Emoticon_Action, cafe headpat bubbles

legacy.notes: old v8n, to be retrained with yolo26 + VFX augmentation

unified._doc: v6b (nc=455). 上线=各域最强(非全替代三模型): pipeline _get_yolo 已接线(2026-06-05), ui tag 用 v6b 但只取 UI 域(域过滤丢弃头像143-394+emoticon451), 头像保 fused v4 / 摸头保 v26n 各自独立加载. 全局开关 _UI_IS_UNIFIED 读本 active: 现 PENDING-LIVE-VERIFY = 未通电(日常仍 ui v5/fused v4/v26n, 零影响); 改成 'v6b' 即通电, 改回 PENDING 秒回滚. 离线铁证已过(scripts/verify_filter_realframes.py: 60真实帧 UI 域零损 / 头像emoticon过滤干净 / v26n+fused v4 fold-in 未误杀), 待 MuMu live 验证(⛔优先 money 防线 cls 实战检出)才正式切 v6b.
unified._active_note: 用户决策(2026-06-06): 分域跑(UI=ui v5 / 头像=fused v4 / 摸头=emoticon v26n 三独立模型), unified 等 v7 全域无敌再上线。PENDING = pipeline._resolve_unified 返 None → _UI_IS_UNIFIED=False → 日常 UI 用 ui v5(零影响)。v6c 仅借作 prefill teacher(见 ui.versions.v6c), 不影响 live。改成具体版本号(如 'v6c')即通电, 秒级回滚。

v6b.notes: ep10 best (ep11+ 退化, 根因 synth:real 2.03 过拟合; 关 mosaic 微调无效). 超 v6 峰 0.805. 替代 ui v5 + fused v4(0.966) + emoticon v26n. 头像 0.85 弱类全在泳装/造型变体(BA 迭代靶子: 飞轮补样本 + 下版降 synth 追 0.9). 接线: unified active 时 pipeline._get_yolo 所有 tag 返回此模型, class 按 _classes.txt nc455 划分(143-394 头像 / 451 emoticon / 其余 UI). MUST infer @imgsz=960. 待 live 验证日常跑通才正式切 active=v6b.

v6c.status: 训练已停(ep12 best 冻结)。砍 UI synth(build_ui_v2 只留 _fused_synth_remap, 去 _synth_ui_swap 伪背景)版。不全域上线(用户决策分域)。
v6c.notes: live 飞轮帧(519, 06-06)实测: UI 入口域大胜 v6b(咖啡厅入口 conf 0.27→0.89, 底栏入口更高)→ 借作 ui.versions.v6c teacher 给 v7 val 标注。代价: cafe 内部 cls(咖啡厅收益/邀请卷)反而退步漏检 → 那几个弱类标注改用 ui v5(旧特化)单独补。cls 过拟合根因仍未根治(train_cls↓/val_cls↑ ep10-12 峰)。⛔ v6c 训练集含 06-03; 06-06 飞轮帧专做 val, train 永不碰。
